overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Zelda game showing the protagonist Link walking through a scenic savanna landscape with giant baobab-like trees. The character navigates around massive trees and crosses open terrain transitioning from sandy to grassy ground under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy savanna with giant baobab trees

events.description: character turns left around the massive tree trunk, moving from facing the tree to facing the open plain

agents.ego_description: navigating around the base of a giant baobab tree, turning left to head into the open savanna

entered.detail: massive tree with thick trunk and green canopy directly ahead at start
distant rocky cliffs forming the left boundary of the valley
distant rocky cliffs forming the right boundary of the valley
scattered giant trees visible in the distance across the plain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing before a massive baobab tree in a sunny savanna. The character walks around the tree, turning left to reveal the open sandy plain ahead with scattered giant trees and distant rocky mountains framing the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy plain with scattered baobab trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open sandy terrain toward the distant trees, maintaining a straight path

entered.detail: large tree with thick trunk coming into view on the left side
large tree with thick trunk coming into view on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the expansive sandy plain, moving away from the starting tree which falls behind. The terrain is dotted with scattered baobab trees that gradually grow larger as the character approaches, with distant mountains visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy savanna valley approaching a landmark tree

events.description: ground surface transitions from sand to tall golden grass as the character enters the grassy valley section

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward a prominent landmark tree standing between rocky valley walls

entered.detail: distinctive large tree standing alone in the valley ahead, serving as a navigation landmark
golden tall grass covering the ground, swaying in the wind
steep rocky cliff face forming the left side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to tall golden grass as the character enters a valley. A prominent baobab tree stands in the distance between rocky cliff walls, serving as a focal point. The character continues walking toward this landmark tree through the swaying grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny savanna that transitions from an open sandy plain into a lush, grassy valley. It begins with the character standing before a massive baobab tree, circling around its trunk to reveal a vast expanse of sand dotted with giant trees and framed by distant rocky mountains. As the character walks forward, the initial tree recedes into the background while other scattered baobabs grow larger and more prominent against the horizon. The scene then shifts as the sandy terrain gives way to tall, swaying golden grass, leading the character deeper into a valley enclosed by rocky cliff walls. Finally, the camera tracks the character's steady progress through the grass toward a single, towering baobab tree that stands as a focal point in the distance.
